title: Calcium Muscle Contraction
script_summary: Exploring the pivotal role of calcium in muscle contraction.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about calcium muscle contraction.
Calcium isn't just a nutrient; it's the key to muscle movement.
When a nerve signals your muscle, calcium floods in like a wave.
This triggers actin and myosin to interact, causing contraction. It's a dance of proteins!
Without calcium, muscles stay relaxed. So, every lift, every sprint relies on this mineral.
Want to dive deeper into science? Hit that follow for more fascinating facts!
